title: globularia meridionalis
intro: Globularia meridionalis, also known as the Spanish globe or globe thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Globularia meridionalis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in herbal supplements, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
